line_preview: META-DATA DOCUMENTATION
Dataset Title: Circadian typology is related to resilience and optimism in healthy adults
Persistent Identifier: 10.5281/zenodo.[TU_NUEVO_DOI]
Associated Publication (DOI): 10.3109/07420528.2015.1008700
Principal Investigators: Antúnez, J. M.; Navarro, J. F.; Adan, A.
FILE INVENTORY
Dataset.csv: Raw data (UTF-8 encoding, comma separator).
Dataset.sav: SPSS Statistics data file.
README.txt: This documentation file.
DATA DICTIONARY (Selected Variables)
Codigo_user: Randomized unique identifier for each participant.
Edad / Sexo: Age (years) and Gender (1: Male, 2: Female).
RMEQ_TOT / RMEQ1-RMEQ5: rMEQ total score and individual items.
CDRISC / CDR1-CDR10: Resilience total score and items.
LOTR / LOT1-LOT10: Optimism total score and items.
TC: Chronotype category (1: Evening, 2: Neither, 3: Morning).
Substance Use: Frequency of consumption for Tabaco, Café, Te, Alcohol, etc.
METHODOLOGICAL NOTES

Data collected through online psychometric platforms. Scores were calculated according to the original authors' instructions for each scale. All missing values in string columns represent "None" or "Negative" responses.
TERMS OF USE
This dataset is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) license.
CITATION
Please cite the original article and this Zenodo record when using these data.
